name: Titan Acquisition Corp.
business: Titan Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed to effect a merger or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any specific business combination target and has generated no operating revenues. The company intends to focus on industries that complement its management team's background, particularly finance and tech-enabled services.

exposures.sentence: While we may pursue an acquisition opportunity in any business, industry, sector or geographical location, we intend to focus on industries that complement our management team s background and network, and to capitalize on the ability of our management team and board of directors to identify and acquire a business, focusing on the finance and tech-enabled services industries.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: Pursuant to our amended and restated memorandum and articles of association, have until 24 months from the closing of our IPO, or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to complete an initial business combination.
